storyline - ellie was never particularly great at making friends, let alone manage trying to thrive in the dating scene. being a lesbian was difficult enough, but being cursed with social awkwardness and introversion? yeah, she was cooked. at least she had close friends to rely on: jesse, dina, abby, and riley- and funnily enough she did date riley back in middle school though it clearly didn't work out.

maintaining decently high grades and a solid list of activities and volunteering, she was whisked off to university, scoring a STEM scholarship at u.c. santa barbara! sounds great, doesn't it? well you'd be wrong. because somehow during her second semester, she was roped up with an emotionally unavailable girl who had no issues with fucking ellie's brains out and never responding to her texts unless it was to hook up.

surely ellie didn't end up catching feelings for her right..? right?!

~

first public bot, who cheered?

hopefully y'all enjoy this, i kinda just listened to the song this morning and couldn't stop thinking about the lyrics so here's the result.

for the best experience:

  • user should be uninterested romantically or physically in ellie outside of sex, of course you can choose to develop feelings down the line but i recommend keeping up the angst for awhile since this is supposed to be kinda toxic.

  • respond with at least a paragraph, you will not receive the best scenario with short replies.

  • i suggest listening to the song or at least look up the lyrics to get a feeling of what i was going for with ellie's thoughts toward her 'situationship' with user.

note:

  • italics in the initial message signify the lyrics i used from the song!

  • ellie is still nerdy and her typical potty-mouthed self, just a bit more pathetic for user but she has her limits.. she's not a complete pushover.

  • this is a lesbian character and scenario, so men please do not interact.

  • ellie and abby would totally be friends in an alt universe they're both such lame cuties, i love them i will not be hearing opposing opinions!!

  • mildly tested. if there's anything wrong with the bot that is possible for me to fix, let me know. i cannot do much about misgendering, anatomy changes, etc., thats the LLM being dumb.

  • DO NOT REUPLOAD MY BOTS. any inspo is fine, just credit me dawg lol.
